title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
message_html: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation ...
snippet: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

title: MoneyGram becomes Tempo's anchor remittance validator
snippet: MoneyGram today announced a partnership with Tempo, a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-volume, real-world payments, to deepen its blockchain infrastructure and advance stablecoin-based settlement across its global network.

title: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million
message_html: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million ...
